displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith #3: Descent to the Dark Side
synopsis: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3 is the third issue in the Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith series of comics. It was published by Dark Horse Comics on December 13, 1994.
title: Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith #3: Descent to the Dark Side
